description: Golden example assistant wording for the patient clinical-trial eligibility flow.

messages.speaker: assistant
messages.message: Based on what you shared, you appear to match several of the main screening factors for this trial: non-small cell lung cancer, stage IV disease, PD-L1 positivity, and cancer progression after prior treatment. Your report that EGFR and ALK were negative also helps clarify the genomic profile being screened. This is only a preliminary eligibility screen, though, and the study site would still need to confirm the full criteria, including any additional medical exclusions. [Public NSCLC Trial Eligibility Criteria]

response_traits: summarizes the relevant disease and treatment factors
uses criteria-based rather than diagnostic language
